articles.title: U.S. intercepted Iranian missiles targeting American forces in Kuwait, Central Command says - CNBC
articles.description: The latest attacks further undermine what remains of a U.S.-Iran ceasefire, and will likely add strain to ongoing efforts to reach a deal that will end the war.
